name: adapt-workspace
description: Workspace helper scripts for ADAPT services

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix engine-service ci && npm --prefix frontend ci
scripts.build:all: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix engine-service run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.db:prepare: npm --prefix backend run migrate && npm --prefix backend run seed
scripts.check:final: npm run build:all && npm run db:prepare
